title: Stored XSS in project dashboard
summary: User-supplied project names may render without escaping in a dashboard view.
evidence: Screenshot shows benign script-marker execution in a maintainer-owned test instance.
No production user data was accessed.
impact: A project editor may execute JavaScript in another maintainer session.
reproductionNotes: Use a local test instance and a harmless marker string only.
requestedOutcome: Confirm impact, assign severity, and prepare a responsible fix plan.
